Online shopping made simple.

desk mats look like the right first range

The latest direction is sharper now: use oversized desk mats as the hero category, then add mouse pads later if the first designs get traction.

why this category wins early

  • stronger perceived value than basic mouse pads
  • better visual impact for Etsy and social content
  • works across workspace, gaming, gifting, and study niches
  • cleaner premium positioning for the kask brand

recommended first spec

  • around 900 x 400 mm flagship size
  • non-slip rubber base
  • smooth printed top surface
  • stitched edges where possible
  • sample before trusting supplier photography

Stored working note: slakkaBrands/kask/kask-desk-mats-sourcing-report.md

This report now gives the card a concrete next step: shortlist 3 suppliers, sample 2 designs, and build the first 6-product launch sheet around desk mats rather than trying to split attention too early.

share your feedback

We love using our creativity create moments of joy as part of the slakka family of products and services. Please contact us if you have any ideas or feedback.
